json.prompt:
1. STYLE / GENRE — Surreal ASMR micro-film; tactile, cinematic, impossible-yet-feels-real with divine overtones.

2. REFERENCE IMAGE INSTRUCTION — (No reference image provided.)

3. SCENE DESCRIPTION — POV: Our hand, palm up, cradles a handfull of Gold Feather in the center of an ethereal glowing hall of light columns. Each feather is impossibly weightless and radiant, with gold filaments flowing and shimmering as if alive—defying gravity, they ripple and float, each movement trailing luminous echoes. When our fingers tap or brush the filaments, the golden strands flex gracefully, sending waves of glowing dust and light along their lengths. The environment amplifies the sensation: sunlit haze diffuses across marble floors, shimmering pillars rise into the light. The air is filled with soft, swirling particles, elevating every gesture with warmth and elegance. Setting and subject feel inseparable, divinely elevated, never cartoony.

4. CINEMATOGRAPHY — 9:16 vertical (1080×1920); 80mm lens, shallow DOF isolates feathers/hand; 180° shutter; slow, continuous POV dolly-orbit creates parallax between hand, feathers, and glowing marble environment; motion present start-to-end, no fades in or out.

5. ACTIONS & TIMING — 0.0s: Camera already in gentle orbit, golden filaments in motion. 0–3.0s: Establish hand scooping and lifting Gold Feather, sunlight reflecting and diffusing. 3.0–7.0s: Fingers tap, lift, and pet filaments; feathers flex, ripple, and shed shimmering golden dust that glows in air. 5.0s: Whisper—"Gold Feather"—softly, intimately, into the center-mic. 7.0–10.0s: Macro close-up, feathers trail luminous dust, camera tightens focus as feathers coil and dance in golden light, motion continues through final frame.

6. AUDIO / ASMR — Ambient sunlit marble hall at ~‑28 dBFS; gentle breath of air; hyper-detailed foley: distinct nail tapping/light brushing on feathery gold (delicate, luminous), soft flowing dust sounds, faint fingernail resonance on stray filaments; 5.0s: dry, mic-intimate center whisper: "Gold Feather" (no other words).

7. MUSIC / SCORE — Soft, radiant ambient drone in A minor, gilded by overtones; 0–3s gentle, reverent lift; 3–7s elegant, swelling warmth; 7–10s softens into weightless aura; ~‑12 LUFS; meditative i–iv or i–v progression, subtle, glowing, divine.

8. COLOR / GRADE — Palette: radiant gold, marble white, sunbeam amber, pale cream, diffuse soft haze; luminous, warm, elegant—palette feels divine and otherworldly, never cartoony or cheap.

9. NOTES / CONSTRAINTS — 10.0s, single continuous shot in vertical 9:16; motion never stops; mandatory center-mic whisper at 5.0s; cross-dissolve or flow-through transitions only; pronounced nail tapping on gold filaments; particle shimmer and luminous dust encouraged; no on-screen text; touch always safe, no burns or harm.

10. SINGLE-LINE SUMMARY — A 10-second surreal ASMR micro-film for October: Gold Feather — a hand cradles and taps impossibly weightless gold filaments in a glowing marble hall, shedding luminous dust and divine warmth with every motion and an intimate whisper.

1. STYLE / GENRE — Surreal ASMR micro-film; tactile, cinematic, serene, sensory-first, impossible yet filmable.

2. REFERENCE IMAGE INSTRUCTION — (No reference image provided.)

3. SCENE DESCRIPTION — POV perspective: Our hand hovers gently above a gleaming marble plinth surrounded by an ethereal dawn mist. Cradled in the palm is a small handfull of Velvet Grain. Each grain is impossibly soft, matte, and plush—like microspheres of rich midnight velvet—slowly tumbling, clinging, and reshaping as fingers caress and tap them. As the grains move, they absorb and mute the ambient light, darkening and blooming with a gentle, enigmatic glow at the edges. Subtle pale shimmer outlines the grains, and tactile micro-vibrations pulse through each touch. The grains cascade and pool in small, mesmerizing waves with the motion of the hand, evoking the tranquil impossibility of velvet transformed into shifting sand. The plinth and misty void glow softly, heightening a serene, intimate atmosphere where object and setting blend into a higher-powered, peaceful surrealism.

4. CINEMATOGRAPHY — 9:16 vertical (1080×1920); 78mm simulated lens, shallow DOF isolating hand and Velvet Grain; 180° shutter; slow, continuous POV dolly-in with gentle side-orbit; visible parallax between hand, grains, plinth, and misty light; motion present from 0.0s through 10.0s, no fade-in or fade-out.

5. ACTIONS & TIMING — 0.0s START IN MOTION: Camera drifting in slow, lateral orbit, hand already shifting Velvet Grain. 0–3.0s: Close on hand as grains gently cascade, camera eases in. 3.0–7.0s: Fingers tap, pinch, and swirl through grains, micro-particles bounce and form plush valleys. 5.0s: Whisper—"Velvet Grain"—intimately, directly into the mic. 7.0–10.0s: Macro focus as hand pets and lets grains cascade, close shimmer and soft glow, motion continues seamlessly until 10.0s.

6. AUDIO / ASMR — Ambient void at ~-28 dBFS (soft diffused wind, faint marble resonance); hyper-detailed foley: plush rustle of grains, delicate nail tapping on plinth and grains (dry, soft, lush); gentle palm sweeps and pinches; 5.0s: one intimate, dry whisper (“Velvet Grain”) at center mic, no additional dialogue.

7. MUSIC / SCORE — Soft drone ambient in A minor; 0–3s gradual serene rise, 3–7s mellow intimate swell, 7–10s soften to a peaceful fade; ~-12 LUFS; meditative i–iv progression with shimmering overtone, always gentle.

8. COLOR / GRADE — Deep midnight blue, matte black, alabaster white, soft lavender dawn, pale gold shimmer. Palette is serene, plush, otherworldly; grade carries an elevated softness and cinematic intimacy—never cartoony, always sublime.

9. NOTES / CONSTRAINTS — 10 seconds, single vertical shot; continuous flowing motion from frame 0.0s to 10.0s; mic-intimate whisper mandatory at 5.0s; cross-dissolve transitions for seamless flow if needed; no on-screen text; nail tapping sound emphasized on grains/plinth; visible plush/velvet micro-texture on grains; impossible interaction—velvet grains tumble without dust or residue; particle shimmer at grain edges subtly encouraged.

10. SINGLE-LINE SUMMARY — A 10-second surreal ASMR micro-film for October: Velvet Grain — hand caresses and taps impossibly soft, plush grains atop a marble plinth in luminous dawn mist, whispering serene softness as tactile velvet magic flows and shimmers.

1. STYLE / GENRE — Surreal ASMR micro-film; sensory-first, tactile, enigmatic, impossible-yet-filmable.

3. SCENE DESCRIPTION — POV perspective: a hand hovers above an obsidian pedestal in a dimly glowing void, cradling a handfull of Molten Thread. Each thread flows like liquid metal, shimmering with impossible continuity—silvery gold, ember-red, and blue heat, twisting and streaming in slow, gravity-defying arcs. As fingers lift, separate, or tap the threads, they flex, coil, and flow between the digits, responding in soft, elegant choreography that feels hypnotic and divine. None drip or burn; all shimmer with heat mirage and iridescent light. The pedestal radiates a faint, enigmatic warmth. Wisps of vapor drift upward where the threads ripple. Setting and subject are inseparable—ritualistic and otherworldly, never cartoony or harsh.

4. CINEMATOGRAPHY — 9:16 vertical (1080×1920); 80mm lens, shallow DOF isolates the hand and threads, soft obsidian base diffused; 180° shutter. A slow, continuous POV dolly-orbit, parallax between hand, threads, and glowing void; inertia feels substantial. Motion is present from 0.0s through 10.0s—no fade-in or fade-out.

5. ACTIONS & TIMING — 0.0s: Start already in gentle orbiting motion as hand rotates, threads flex. 0–3.0s: Camera closes in as fingers divide and lift molten threads, which flow and recoil with impossible physicality. 3.0–7.0s: Exploration—tapping, stretching, and flicking the threads creates flowing, heat-rippled effects; divine shimmer with each touch. 5.0s: Intimate whisper begins: “Molten Thread.” 7.0–10.0s: Macro close-up, threads undulate and shimmer, vapor drifting as the camera tightens around fingers and glowing, hot metal strands; still in motion at 10.0s.

6. AUDIO / ASMR — Ambient vacuum-bed at ~-28 dBFS with a deep, subtle heat shimmer; hyper-detailed foley: delicate nail tapping and sliding on metallic threads (soft chime, faint sizzle, no sharpness); vapor swishes and flowing metal slither. Whisper at 5.0s: “Molten Thread,” dry, intimate, centered, no extra dialogue.

7. MUSIC / SCORE — Soft drone ambient in A minor; 0–3s: gentle, growing tension, 3–7s: enigmatic, swelling chords, 7–10s: soften into haunting dissolve. Mix ~-12 LUFS; progression: sustained i–iv–i, minimal and meditative with subtle heat shimmer.

8. COLOR / GRADE — Silvery gold, ember red, obsidian black, deep blue, soft heat-white. The palette is elevated, enigmatic, glowing; not cartoony—light pools on the threads and hand, with heat-rippled gradients and faint vapor/aura.

9. NOTES / CONSTRAINTS — 10s, single vertical shot; no cuts or fades; whisper at 5.0s, mic-intimate; only cross-dissolve/flowing motion transitions; emphasize nail tapping on metallic threads; impossible touch is safe (no burning); ambient shimmer, no on-screen text.

10. SINGLE-LINE SUMMARY — A 10-second surreal ASMR micro-film for October: Molten Thread — hands lift, tap, and stretch impossibly glowing, liquid-metal threads in a ritual void, whispering their name as heat and shimmer flow with every cinematic touch.

1. STYLE / GENRE — Surreal ASMR micro-film; tactile, cinematic, dreamlike-yet-grounded, awe-inspiring and ultra-sensory.

3. SCENE DESCRIPTION — POV: Our hand gathers a handfull of impossibly fine Crystal Dust from the surface of a faceted crystalline altar set in a boundless, sunlit sky-vault. Each motion lifts dust that glistens and refracts in spectral micro-rainbows, drifting and swirling in weightless, vaporous clouds. The descriptor is visible: "crystal" makes every granule uniquely angular, each edge sending tiny rays of light across the palm; "dust" mechanics make the substance powder-fine yet coherent, swirling and reforming as if magnetized by our touch. As fingers gently tap and swirl, the dust flows around our skin, sparkling, scattering like trembling light. The sense is fragile, unmistakably awe-striking—crystal clarity manifested in every suspended shimmer. Setting and object are inseparable: the sky cavity amplifies every flake's radiance, the altar's surface glows with impossibly sharp parallax.

4. CINEMATOGRAPHY — 9:16 vertical (1080×1920); simulated 80mm lens, shallow DOF isolating hand/dust; 180° shutter. Slow POV dolly-orbit, parallax between altar, hands, and sky vault; continuous motion 0.0–10.0s; absolutely no fade-in/fade-out.

5. ACTIONS & TIMING — 0.0s: Camera enters in slow orbit as dust is swirled in hand. 0–3.0s: Establish palm, dust, altar, and boundless sky, dust already flowing. 3.0–7.0s: Fingers tap, whirl, and drop crystal dust, sending out refractive bursts and micro-particle clouds. 5.0s: Whisper ("Crystal Dust") begins; mic-close, dry, center. 7.0–10.0s: Macro on dust flowing from fingertip, sparkling in heightened clarity; motion never pauses; ends in a slow push across crystalline grain.

6. AUDIO / ASMR — Ambient bed at ~-28 dBFS: distant light wind in open sky; hyper-detailed foley—crisp, dry nail tapping on altar and dust, shimmer and scatter of crystalline powder, soft hand brushes. 5.0s: Whisper ("Crystal Dust")—intimate and direct, one center-mic phrase only.

7. MUSIC / SCORE — Gentle ambient drone in A minor; 0–3s subtle, high overtone lift; 3–7s slight swell and sustain; 7–10s gradual soften and thinning—~–12 LUFS. Meditative i–iv or i–v progressions, shimmering pads, nothing cartoon.

8. COLOR / GRADE — Diamond white, glacial blue, prismatic lilac, radiant gold, soft sunlight. Very crisp, airy, and luminous; fragile clarity dominates, palette glows with awe and impossibility. Never cartoony—always ethereal, elegant, and elevated.

9. NOTES / CONSTRAINTS — Single 10.0s shot, vertical; motion seamless and continuous; NO cuts/fades. Whisper at 5.0s, center-mic, mandatory. Cross-dissolve flow if transition needed, never static. Nail tapping emphasized on hard dust and altar. Particle shimmer required. Safe touch/interaction—never sharp or dangerous. No on-screen text or extra dialogue.

10. SINGLE-LINE SUMMARY — A 10-second surreal ASMR micro-film for October: Crystal Dust — a hand swirls fine, prismatic dust on a crystal altar under a radiant sky, whispering awe as every shimmer reveals fragile clarity.

Gentle ripples pass between fingers, splitting and reforming in mesmerizing impossible patterns—each droplet floats, never spills, and leaves a faint, glowing tracer on the hand. The chamber amplifies the magic: shimmering pillars, floating light particles, and soft refracted shadows encase the scene. The interaction is impossibly safe, luminous, and charged with tranquil awe.

6. 7. MUSIC / SCORE — Soft ambient drone in A minor; 0–3s: gentle, haunting rise; 3–7s: shimmering harmonic swell; 7–10s: fades to luminous serenity; -12 LUFS dynamic range; simple i–iv–i or i–v progressions, subtle and meditative.

9. NOTES / CONSTRAINTS — 10 seconds, single vertical shot; always in motion; 5.0s whisper ("Liquid Light"), mic-intimate; flow-through cross-dissolve style transitions if needed; nail tapping prominent in liquid; particle shimmer at edges; impossible—liquid light safely held and touched; no text, no cuts, no fade effects.

10. SINGLE-LINE SUMMARY — A 10-second surreal ASMR micro-film for October: Liquid Light — fingers swirl, tap, and cradle impossibly radiant liquid in a glowing obsidian chamber, whispering soft awe as haunting serenity pulses gently through light and shadow.

3. SCENE DESCRIPTION — POV: Our hand lifts a Mercury Feather from an obsidian ripple pedestal, all set in a shadowy, endless reflective void. The feather is impossibly slender and weightless, forged of living liquid metal—each barb oscillates in slow-motion waves, reflecting starlike points of light in mercury sheen. Molten droplets visibly suspend and travel along the feather’s surface but never fall. As our hand turns and taps the feather, tension ripples cause the mercury to flex and dance, while gravity seems uncertain—liquid strands part, recombine, and reform sleek, hypnotic shapes. The environment’s boundaries blur with every movement, echoing reflective surfaces and liquid shimmer. The action is both mesmerizing and slightly tense, the piece fluid but never chaotic, always elevated and enigmatic—never cartoony.

6. AUDIO / ASMR — Ambient vacuum bed at ~-28 dBFS, layered with tensioned metallic undertones. Hyper-detailed foley: nail tapping on mercury feather (liquid-film clicks, soft metallic ripples), sliding liquid sounds, subtle finger sweeps. 5.0s: Whisper ("Mercury Feather"), dry, intimate, and centered.

7. MUSIC / SCORE — Soft, tense drone in A minor, undertones of fluidity and quiet suspense. 0–3s: gentle rise; 3–7s: tension swells with subtle melodic fragments; 7–10s: music softens, returning to an unresolved tension. Mix to ~-12 LUFS with slow, meditative i–iv progressions.

9. NOTES / CONSTRAINTS — Single 10.0s shot, vertical 9:16; continuous motion; whisper at 5.0s, mic-intimate; cross-dissolve transitions keep flow; pronounced nail tapping on liquid/metal surface; particle shimmer at surface boundaries; no on-screen text, safe impossible touch (mercury isn’t toxic here), descriptor mechanics must be visible and tactile.
